prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次约 492→340→293→256→305 名，2021–2024 年持续前移（累计前移约 236 名），2025 年回落至 305 名（较 2024 年后移 49 名），近两年波动加大；2025 年基准约 305 名；本省理科（物理类）计划 2021–2022 年 29 人，2023 年 27 人，2024 年 25 人，2025 年增至 30 人；2026 年计划 33 人，较 2025 年扩招 3 人（+10%），扩招使竞争加剧，位次数字有增大压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜第 5 名（2026 年），稳居全国顶尖梯队，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（师德师风、学校管理类事件），但抖音热度排名第 4（高热），整体关注度极高；2025 年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学 A++ 等）；未见明显投档断档记录，报考心理总体稳定；复旦大学 A- 及以上学科超过 20 个，包括数学 A+、物理学 A+、化学 A、生物学 A+、临床医学 A、计算机科学与技术 A、电子科学与技术 A、材料科学与工程 A- 等，与理科招生专业高度匹配，学科实力对考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等复旦强势工科专业持续高热推荐；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 167419 人，较 2025 年 173347 人减少约 3.4%，竞争略有缓解，2025 年物理类本科批 419 分、特殊类型线 507 分，近年波动不大；复旦大学位于上海，属一线城市，对山西考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在山西招生计划相对稳定，无显著地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 305 名、2026 年扩招 10%（位次数字增大）、本省物理类考生略减（竞争略缓解）、学校声誉虽有负面但整体关注度极高、学科实力顶尖等因素，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年小幅后移。预测最低位次约333名，区间283–383名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Science (Physics Category) minimum ranking approximately 492→340→293→256→305, with continuous advancement from 2021 to 2024 (cumulative advancement of about 236 places), and a decline to 305 in 2025 (49 places behind 2024), with increased fluctuation in the last two years; 2025 baseline approximately 305; provincial Science (Physics Category) plan: 29 in 2021–2022, 27 in 2023, 25 in 2024, increased to 30 in 2025; 2026 plan 33, an expansion of 3 (+10%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition and putting upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 5th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), firmly in the national top tier, highly attractive to high-scoring students; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative (teacher ethics, school management incidents), but Douyin popularity ranked 4th (high heat), overall attention extremely high; 2025 reputation slightly positive (Journalism and Communication A++, etc.); no obvious enrollment gaps recorded, application psychology generally stable; Fudan University has over 20 A- or above disciplines, including Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A, Biology A+, Clinical Medicine A, Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A-, etc., highly matching the science enrollment majors, with strong disciplinary appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other strong Fudan engineering majors continue to be highly recommended; provincial 2026 Physics Category candidates approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition; 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line 419, special type line 507, with little fluctuation in recent years; Fudan University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Shanxi candidates; the school's enrollment plan in Shanxi is relatively stable, with no significant regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 305, 2026 expansion of 10% (upward pressure on ranking numbers), slight decrease in provincial Physics Category candidates (slight easing of competition), slightly negative school reputation but extremely high overall attention, and top disciplinary strength, it is expected that the 2026 minimum ranking will slightly decline compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 333, range 283–383.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 283–383, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics Class, Physics Class, Science Experimental Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Shannon Plan, Leading Talent Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Computing and Intelligence Innovation College, etc.) as a safe backup. Fudan's engineering strength is strong, and the social popularity of Electronic Information/Computer Science majors remains high, so competition is expected to be intense; it is recommended to reasonably match tiers.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度分化观望（考公优势明显）、新闻传播学明显劝退（但复旦新闻为 A+ 顶级学科）；本省 2026 年历史类考生约 63113 人，较 2025 年 84879 人大幅减少约 25.6%，竞争明显缓解，2025 年历史类本科批 443 分、特殊类型线 534 分；复旦大学位于上海，属一线城市，对山西文科考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在山西文科招生计划稳定在 11–16 人之间，无显著地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 73 名、2026 年缩招 1 人（位次数字略减小）、本省历史类考生大幅减少约 25.6%（竞争明显缓解）、学校声誉虽有负面但整体关注度极高、文科顶尖学科实力等因素，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年小幅前移。预测最低位次约67名，区间17–117名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 61→69→59→62→73, fluctuating within a very narrow range of 59–73, with a maximum fluctuation of only 14 places in the past 5 years, indicating highly stable rankings; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 73; the provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 12 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 13, a reduction of 1 person (-7.1%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to decrease the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 5th on the Soft Science main list, with particularly outstanding liberal arts strength (Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Philosophy A+, Law A-, etc.), strongly attracting top liberal arts candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, but Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with overall extremely high attention; the reputation for 2025 is somewhat positive; no obvious record of enrollment gaps, and the application psychology is generally stable; Fudan University has a dense concentration of advantageous liberal arts disciplines: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Philosophy A+, Political Science A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Law A-, Sociology A, etc., which highly match the liberal arts enrollment majors, and the strength of these disciplines strongly attracts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law social heat is divided and wait-and-see (advantageous for civil service exams), Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged (but Fudan's Journalism is A+ top discipline); the number of history category candidates in the province for 2026 is approximately 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, markedly easing competition; in 2025, the history category undergraduate batch line was 443 points, and the special type line was 534 points; Fudan University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong cross-provincial appeal for Shanxi liberal arts candidates; the school's enrollment plan for liberal arts in Shanxi is stable between 11–16 people, with no significant changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 73, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 1 person (ranking number slightly decreases), the significant reduction of about 25.6% in provincial history category candidates (competition markedly eases), the school's reputation being somewhat negative but overall attention extremely high, and the top-tier strength of liberal arts disciplines, it is expected that the minimum ranking for 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 67, with a range of 17–117.

- Law

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range of 17–117, given that Fudan's liberal arts rankings in Shanxi are extremely high and highly stable (59–73 in the past 5 years), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Economics, Social Science Experimental Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Journalism and Communication, Law) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, History) as a safe backup. Fudan's liberal arts strength is top in the country, and although competition is fierce, ranking fluctuations are minimal. Candidates are advised to accurately position themselves based on their interests.
